notes: Optimizes api.sh request parsing by decoding only parameters that are present in the request
Replaces byte-by-byte POST body read with head -c for faster CGI request handling
Adds a short RAM snapshot cache for status and dashboard_summary with automatic invalidation on state-changing actions
Caches only valid JSON snapshots and keeps cache TTL configurable through KV_STATUS_CACHE_TTL
Hardens the lazy parameter decoder against shell command substitution in request values
Yandex OAuth fallback, Hysteria2 support, no-mux VLESS scan validation and safe server switching behavior are preserved
